name: Naughty Baby Prankster
description: Begin a chaotic and hilarious adventure in Naughty Baby Prankster! As a mischievous baby who loves exploring every corner of the house and turning ordinary moments into funny surprises. Every room hides new toys, tools, and prank opportunities waiting to be discovered! This playful experience mixes humor, creativity, and light strategy, making it a fun choice for fans of simulator games with a twist.
instructions: On PC WASD Move your character Shift Run G Crawling F Open the door or proceed On Mobile Click the on-screen button to operate
